# Clean up signatures for disease-drug comparison

### Last modified: 06/17/25

### Author: Kewalin Samart

```{r sourcing functions}
library(here)
source(here("scripts/01_signature_landmark_prep_functions.R"))
```

```{r getting L1000 genes}
L1000genes = getL1000() 
head(L1000genes)
```

```{r reading in a signature and clean it up}
# read in an example signature (output of limma, DESeq2)
GSE54992_GPL570_signature = read_tsv(here("data/microarray_TBsignatures/dn/GSE54992_GPL570_MTB_control_dn_none.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

# clean up the signature (all genes included)
clean_signature = prepare_signature(signature = GSE54992_GPL570_signature,
                  L1000 = FALSE)
print(clean_signature)
print(dim(clean_signature))

# clean up the signature (L1000 genes only)
clean_L1000signature = prepare_signature(signature = GSE54992_GPL570_signature,
                  L1000 = TRUE)
print(clean_L1000signature)
print(dim(clean_L1000signature))
```
